functions.description: Modified Kadane's algorithm returning (start, end, sum) of max-sum contiguous subarray with earliest-start tie policy.
functions.harder_than_wave1_because: Four interacting state variables (cur_sum, cur_start, best_sum, best_start/end); tie-policy is strict (earliest start wins); all-negative edge case handled differently from empty case.

functions.description: Detect strict local peaks and valleys in a sequence, skipping boundary elements and plateaus.
functions.harder_than_wave1_because: Dual condition checks per element; plateau exclusion requires strict inequality on both sides; boundary sentinel semantics differ from interior logic.

functions.description: Find start, end, and value of longest consecutive equal-element run; earliest-start tie policy.
functions.harder_than_wave1_because: Requires closing final run after loop; tie policy (strictly-greater-length only) means first wins; multiple interacting variables (cur_start, cur_val, best_start, best_end, best_val).

functions.description: Extract all maximal contiguous sublists where every element exceeds a threshold.
functions.harder_than_wave1_because: Segment boundary detection requires flushing current_segment on value exit and after loop; strict vs non-strict threshold boundary is a T2-injectable location.

functions.description: Sort and merge overlapping/touching intervals into a non-overlapping sorted list.
functions.harder_than_wave1_because: Sort-then-scan with mutable current interval; touching-interval boundary (<=) is T2-injectable; must append final interval after loop; max-end extension logic.

functions.description: Return all unique (a,b) value pairs from a sorted list summing to target, deduplicating repeated values.
functions.harder_than_wave1_because: Duplicate-skipping logic after match requires advancing both pointers past equal values; interaction between deduplication and pointer convergence condition.

functions.description: Multiset intersection of two sorted lists preserving duplicate counts.
functions.harder_than_wave1_because: Dual-cursor merge with three-way branch; result is multiset (not set) — off-by-one in either pointer advance gives wrong duplicate counts.

functions.description: Split a list into (true_group, false_group) by predicate, preserving relative order in each group.
functions.harder_than_wave1_because: Return value is a tuple of two lists; predicate semantics are inverted for false_group; T3 potential: swap return order, return interleaved, or return indices.

functions.description: Split a list into chunks whenever a key function value changes, supporting optional identity key.
functions.harder_than_wave1_because: Key function indirection adds a layer vs simple equality; must append trailing chunk after loop; None-key fallback requires conditional lambda assignment.

functions.description: Group (key, value) pairs and compute per-group count, sum, min, and max.
functions.harder_than_wave1_because: Four simultaneous accumulators per group; conditional update for min/max; insertion-order key semantics; empty-group initialization must get all four fields correct.

functions.description: Assign 1-based dense ranks (same rank for ties, no gap after ties) preserving original order.
functions.harder_than_wave1_because: Dense vs standard rank semantics differ; requires sorted-unique mapping then output-order application; T3: swap to standard rank (rank+count_of_ties_above).

functions.description: Return top-k items by primary key (desc) with optional secondary tiebreak key (asc) and stable original-order fallback.
functions.harder_than_wave1_because: Composite sort key with three levels (primary desc, secondary asc, original-index); optional tiebreak_key changes sort tuple; k > len(items) must not error.

functions.description: Bin numeric values into n equal-width buckets (0-indexed); last bucket is inclusive on max_val.
functions.harder_than_wave1_because: Width calculation involves float division; max_val edge case requires explicit clamp to n_buckets-1; all-equal case is a separate branch; bucket arithmetic is off-by-one prone.

functions.description: Extract windows of a fixed size at a configurable stride, with optional trailing partial windows.
functions.harder_than_wave1_because: Loop termination condition i+size<=n differs from i<n; include_partial adds a post-loop branch; stride != 1 skips positions non-trivially.

functions.description: Traverse a 2D matrix in clockwise spiral order using shrinking boundary pointers.
functions.harder_than_wave1_because: Four boundary variables updated in four separate traversal passes per loop iteration; guard conditions on bottom and right traversals prevent double-counting in single-row/column cases.

functions.description: Extract all antidiagonals of a 2D matrix as a list of lists, using index arithmetic over diagonal index d.
functions.harder_than_wave1_because: Row/column range for each diagonal d requires clamped arithmetic: r_start=max(0,d-C+1), r_end=min(R,d+1); column c=d-r must be derived; non-square matrices are tricky.

functions.description: Convert camelCase/PascalCase to snake_case with abbreviation handling (XMLParser -> xml_parser) using character-level scan.
functions.harder_than_wave1_because: Three distinct underscore-insertion rules interact per character; abbreviation boundary detection requires lookahead and lookback simultaneously; no regex — pure character scan.

functions.description: Scan an arithmetic expression into (type, value) token pairs for NUM, OP, LPAREN, RPAREN.
functions.harder_than_wave1_because: State machine with variable-length NUM accumulation; index management (i vs j for NUM end); four distinct token types with different scan logic; partial-number boundary conditions.

functions.description: Locate top-level balanced bracket spans (start, end) using a depth counter; ignores unmatched brackets.
functions.harder_than_wave1_because: Depth counter and span_start tracking interact; must only record outermost spans (depth==0 after decrement); unmatched close brackets silently ignored via depth>0 guard.

functions.description: Welford's online algorithm computing running (count, mean, population_variance) at each step.
functions.harder_than_wave1_because: Two-delta update (delta before and after mean update) is non-obvious and numerically significant; M2 accumulation must use both deltas; population (not sample) variance requires /n not /(n-1).

functions.description: Build a sorted (value, count, cumulative_fraction) frequency table from a flat list.
functions.harder_than_wave1_because: Three-field output tuple; cumulative fraction requires running sum across sorted unique values; sort on arbitrary comparable types; empty-input guard.

functions.description: Group (key, value) pairs into a dict of value-lists, preserving insertion order and per-group value order.
functions.harder_than_wave1_because: Insertion-order semantics require dict presence check before append; T3 potential: return first-only, last-only, or count instead of list; T2: wrong defaultdict semantics.

next_action: rerun Phase 4A triage on this expanded pool
